title: Polymorphic Artefact Consolidation — defects + user-stories + portfolio-items → artefacts
scope: Consolidate three legacy work-item tables (defects, user_stories, obj_portfolio_items in mmff_vector) into the unified artefacts + artefact_field_values model in vector_artefacts. Each legacy type maps to a seeded artefact_type_id row. Column data becomes field values in artefact_field_values where no native artefact column exists. Once migrated, the /defects, /user-stories, and /portfolio-items handlers are removed (superseded by /work-items filtered by type). The v1 registrations are removed from main.go.
value: Eliminates three legacy endpoint groups and three legacy tables. All work-item-like entities collapse into the unified /work-items v2 surface. Removes the last polymorphic FK complexity in mmff_vector's work-item domain. Enables cross-type queries, shared field library, and consistent ranking/flow behaviour across all artefact types.
implementation_plan: Task 1: Schema audit — map defects, user_stories, obj_portfolio_items columns to artefact columns + artefact_field_values; identify which columns have native artefact equivalents (title, description, status, etc.) and which need field library entries.

Task 2: Seed artefact_types rows for 'Defect', 'User Story', and 'Portfolio Item' in vector_artefacts (or confirm they already exist under different names). Seed matching artefact_field_library entries for any legacy-specific columns.
Task 3: ETL — migrate defects rows → artefacts (type=Defect) + artefact_field_values; validate row counts and spot-check data integrity.
Task 4: ETL — migrate user_stories rows → artefacts (type=User Story) + artefact_field_values.
Task 5: ETL — migrate obj_portfolio_items rows → artefacts (type=Portfolio Item) + artefact_field_values.
Task 6: Verify /work-items v2 GET with type filter returns migrated artefacts for each type. No new handler code needed — /work-items already serves all artefact types via type filter.
Task 7: Deprecate and remove /defects, /user-stories, /portfolio-items handlers from main.go (v1 and any v2 registrations). Archive handler packages as dead code or delete.

Task 8: Update frontend — any direct api('/defects') / api('/user-stories') / api('/portfolio-items') callers switch to apiV2('/work-items?type=defect') etc. or are removed if the UI has already adopted /work-items.
Task 9: Update openapi.yaml to mark the three v1 paths as Deprecated; remove from openapi-v2.yaml if they were ever added.
Task 10: Update c_c_v1_v2_cutover.md, PLA-0030 work_item_backlog, this plan.
areas_impacted: Backend: backend/internal/defects/, userstories/, portfolioitems/ — all handlers removed post-migration
Database: artefacts_schema seeds + ETL migrations for three types
Frontend: legacy api() callers for the three routes → apiV2('/work-items')
Spec: openapi.yaml (mark deprecated), openapi-v2.yaml (no v2 registrations for these routes)
feature_list: Defect artefact type seeded in vector_artefacts
User Story artefact type seeded in vector_artefacts
Portfolio Item artefact type seeded in vector_artefacts
features_extended: /work-items (v2) — now serves defects, user stories, portfolio items via artefact_type filter

work_item_backlog.title: Schema audit: column mapping for all three legacy types
Seed artefact_types + artefact_field_library for Defect/User Story/Portfolio Item
Verify /work-items v2 type-filtered queries return migrated data

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GET /samantha/v2/work-items?artefact_type=defect returns all migrated defect rows with correct field values
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Row count comparison between legacy defects table and migrated artefacts

acceptance_criteria.criterion: check_callers.py reports 0 api('/defects'), api('/user-stories'), api('/portfolio-items') callers

risks.risk: Legacy columns may not have clean artefact_field_library equivalents — custom fields may silently lose data if not mapped
risks.mitigation: Exhaustive schema audit in Task 1; ETL validation query compares row count and spot-checks field values per type before cutting over

risks.risk: Frontend UI for defects/user-stories may depend on the distinct route surface (sorting, filtering, pagination) that /work-items may not yet expose identically
risks.mitigation: Audit frontend callers in Task 8 before removing handlers; add type-filter query params to /work-items if needed

risks.risk: portfolio-items overlap with the /portfolio-items v1 route and the /work-items surface — ambiguity about which items are 'portfolio items' vs artefact-type Portfolio Item
risks.mitigation: Resolve naming and scope in Task 1 schema audit before any ETL runs
